# CUT(1) — Terminal Depths Man Page

## NAME
  cut — remove sections from each line of files

## SYNOPSIS
  cut [-d delimiter] -f field [file]

## DESCRIPTION
Extracts specific fields from each line of input.

## OPTIONS
  -d delim  field delimiter (default: tab)
  -f field  field number to extract

## EXAMPLES
  cut -d: -f1 /etc/passwd
  cat /etc/passwd | cut -d: -f1,3
  cut -d, -f2 users.csv

## SEE ALSO
  awk, sed, grep
